zh.lifeSummary: 當Petronilla Dunstanville於1248年2月22日出生在英國素瑞時，她的父親Walter III Dunstanville 3rd Baron of Castle Combe35歲，母親Dionisia24歲。她於大約1264年與Robert de Montfort在英國素瑞結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1286年之後。

zh-hans.Bradwell-on-Sea, Essex, England: 英国艾可布拉德維爾--希亞
zh-hans.Beaudesert, Warwickshire, England: 英国瓦維其可爾波奧德瑟特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Petronilla Dunstanville于1248年2月22日出生在英国素瑞时，她的父亲Walter III Dunstanville 3rd Baron of Castle Combe35岁，母亲Dionisia24岁。她于大约1264年与Robert de Montfort在英国素瑞结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1286年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Petronilla
meanings: An old female name; an Italian diminutive formed from Pietro, i.e. Peter.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Petronilla Dunstanville was born on 22 February 1248, in Surrey, England, her father, Walter III Dunstanville 3rd Baron of Castle Combe, was 35 and her mother, Dionisia, was 24. She married Robert de Montfort about 1264, in Surrey, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died after 1286.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Petronilla Dunstanville est née le 22 février 1248, à Surrey, Angleterre, son père, Walter III Dunstanville 3rd Baron of Castle Combe, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Dionisia, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Montfort environ 1264, à Surrey, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée après 1286.

de.lifeSummary: Als Petronilla Dunstanville am 22. Februar 1248 in Surrey, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter III Dunstanville 3rd Baron of Castle Combe 35 und ihre Mutter Dionisia 24. Sie hat um 1264 in Surrey, England Robert de Montfort geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb nach 1286.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Petronilla Dunstanville è nata il il 22 febbraio 1248 nel Surrey, England, sua padre, Walter III Dunstanville 3rd Baron of Castle Combe, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Dionisia, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Montfort circa 1264, nel Surrey, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì dopo il 1286.

ja.lifeSummary: Petronilla Dunstanvilleが1248年2月22日にイギリススリーで生まれた時，父Walter III Dunstanville 3rd Baron of Castle Combeは35歳，母Dionisiaは24歳であった。約1264年にイギリススリーでRobert de Montfortと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1286年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Petronilla Dunstanville(이)가 1248년 2월 22일 영국 수리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter III Dunstanville 3rd Baron of Castle Combe(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Dionisia(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1264년 영국 수리에서 Robert de Montfort(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1286년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Petronilla Dunstanville nasceu em 22 de fevereiro de 1248, em Surrey, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter III Dunstanville 3rd Baron of Castle Combe, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Dionisia, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Montfort aproximadamente 1264, em Surrey, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu após 1286.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Petronilla Dunstanville родилась 22 февраля 1248 г. в местности сурри, Англия, её отцу по имени Walter III Dunstanville 3rd Baron of Castle Combe было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Dionisia, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Montfort около 1264 г. в местности сурри, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла после 1286 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Petronilla Dunstanville nació el 22 de febrero de 1248, en Surrey, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter III Dunstanville 3rd Baron of Castle Combe, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Dionisia, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Robert de Montfort aproximadamente 1264, en Surrey, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió después de 1286.
